query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: An elderly man with a full white beard and thin wire-rimmed glasses examines a strip of film negatives using a circular magnifying loupe, viewed in profile from the right against a solid dark backdrop. He holds the strip with both hands, revealing two square frames that depict young children standing together outdoors in front of houses.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An elderly man with a full white beard and thin wire-rimmed glasses examines a strip of film negatives using a circular magnifying loupe, viewed in profile against a solid dark backdrop, the entire image permeated by heavy analog film grain and textured surface noise that create an organic, archival quality. He holds the strip with both hands, revealing two square frames that depict young children standing together outdoors in front of houses, all rendered with the tactile imperfection of black-and-white film stock.
